title: Fireworks 3D
description: Adds a three-dimensional model to firework rockets!
body:
![The project's banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/V8efc2by/images/8d3a453461e83e00e7e10111a7f2099bb34db55d.png)

This resource pack simply changes the 2D item model of firework rockets into a similar, vanilla-like 3D-model. It should also be usuable on older versions than 1.20.2, though only down to 1.20 has been tested.
